tests.name: should generate a valid source map
tests.path: source map generation/generation/should generate a valid source map

tests.name: should include the files and their contents
tests.path: source map generation/generation/should include the files and their contents

tests.name: should not generate source maps when there is no mapping
tests.path: source map generation/generation/should not generate source maps when there is no mapping

tests.name: should return the b64 encoded value
tests.path: source map generation/encodeB64String/should return the b64 encoded value

tests.name: should throw when mappings are added out of order
tests.path: source map generation/errors/should throw when mappings are added out of order

tests.name: should throw when adding segments before any line is created
tests.path: source map generation/errors/should throw when adding segments before any line is created

tests.name: should throw when adding segments referencing unknown sources
tests.path: source map generation/errors/should throw when adding segments referencing unknown sources

tests.name: should throw when adding segments without column
tests.path: source map generation/errors/should throw when adding segments without column

tests.name: should throw when adding segments with a source url but no position
tests.path: source map generation/errors/should throw when adding segments with a source url but no position
